content_insights: Posts with a question in the caption tend to generate noticeably more comments
A hashtag count of around 9-11 tends to yield the highest reach on Instagram
Educational content tends to peak on Tuesday and Thursday mornings
Product posts with a price-focused CTA tend to underperform curiosity-driven posts
Stories with polls tend to drive significantly more DM responses than static posts

top_comments_sample.text: This single-origin pour-over is exactly the morning ritual I needed!
How long does shipping usually take for the Eclipse Espresso bags?
Love the sustainability angle on small-batch roasting — more brands should do this.
Ordered the Eclipse Espresso and the bag arrived torn, beans everywhere.
Do you have any plans to ship internationally?
